name: Tuckman's Stages
description: The four stages of group development: Forming, Storming, Norming, and Performing.

name: Kotter's 8-Step Change Model
description: The definitive process for leading organizational change and making it stick.

name: Goleman's Leadership Styles
description: Six distinct leadership styles, each derived from different components of emotional intelligence.

name: The Golden Circle
description: Simon Sinek's framework for how great leaders inspire action by starting with 'Why'.

name: Radical Candor
description: The ability to challenge directly while caring personally.

name: The Johari Window
description: A technique used to help people better understand their relationship with themselves and others.

name: Psychological Safety
description: Amy Edmondson's research on the shared belief that the team is safe for interpersonal risk-taking.
